# 17+ years of Growing Partnership  
1

IBM Consulting / © 2025 IBM Corporation /IBM & Nationwide Confidential

2022

center established

size over 6 years - focusing on web, mobile, middleware & testing

Team surges to 1200, on the back of Data, AI & partnering in new areas while offshoring to 90%

Launch  
This image is a detailed business timeline. The timeline chronicles the progression of digital initiatives from 2007 to 2024, detailing specific projects and technological shifts year by year.  
**Timeline Details:**  
*   **2007:** Mortgage Origination
*   **2008:** Business Integration
*   **2009:** Internet Banking
*   **2012:** Core Banking
*   **2013:** Multi Channel Development Centre, Test Practice
*   **2014:** New Mobile Bank
*   **2015:** Nationwide Now Remote Mortgage Advice
*   **2016:** App Store, Paym Mobile Payments
*   **2017:** Apple Pay, Next Generation Banking App
*   **2018:** API - MyNationwide Go Live
*   **2019:** Open Banking Regulatory API Gateway Compliance, Resiliency Programme Strategy and Establishment
*   **2020:** Tech Talent Design, CoVid Remote Working
*   **2021:** SAMM Replaces, Microsoft Power Team Mobilized
*   **2022:** PEGA Team Mobilized in BAW, BI ACE Migration
*   **2023:** ALAS Replatforming, SAMM Replaces, Login Modernization, Card Controls
*   **2024:** MCP Fully Rolled Out, FirstGen SaaS  
The timeline also includes additional milestones:
*   **2007:** Mortgage Origination
*   **2008:** Business Integration
*   **2009:** Internet Banking
*   **2012:** Core Banking
*   **2013:** Multi Channel Development Centre, Test Practice
*   **2014:** New Mobile Bank
*   **2015:** Nationwide Now Remote Mortgage Advice
*   **2016:** App Store, Paym Mobile Payments
*   **2017:** Apple Pay, Next Generation Banking App
*   **2018:** API - MyNationwide Go Live
*   **2019:** Open Banking Regulatory API Gateway Compliance, Resiliency Programme Strategy and Establishment
*   **2020:** Tech Talent Design, CoVid Remote Working
*   **2021:** SAMM Replaces, Microsoft Power Team Mobilized
*   **2022:** PEGA Team Mobilized in BAW, BI ACE Migration
*   **2023:** ALAS Replatforming, SAMM Replaces, Login Modernization, Card Controls
*   **2024:** MCP Fully Rolled Out, FirstGen SaaS
name: Chunk 1/8

raw_entities.name: Nationwide
raw_entities.description: A major UK financial services organization and long-term strategic partner of IBM Consulting. The entity is featured throughout a 17-year partnership timeline detailing extensive digital transformation, banking modernization, and technology scaling initiatives across mortgage, mobile, and core banking domains.

raw_entities.name: Digital Development Centre
raw_entities.description: A dedicated offshore and onshore development hub established to support Nationwide's digital transformation. The centre scaled from an initial team of 100 to over 1,200 members, delivering web, mobile, middleware, and testing capabilities to drive banking modernization.
context: Multi Channel Development Centre, Test Practice

raw_entities.name: Resiliency Programme
raw_entities.description: A strategic initiative established in 2019 focused on building system resilience and ensuring regulatory compliance. The programme addresses operational stability requirements and supports the broader open banking and API gateway modernization efforts.
context: 2019: Open Banking Regulatory API Gateway Compliance, Resiliency Programme Strategy and Establishment

raw_entities.name: FirstGen SaaS
raw_entities.description: A next-generation Software-as-a-Service platform fully rolled out in 2024. It represents the culmination of the partnership's modernization efforts, replacing legacy infrastructure with a scalable, cloud-native architecture.
context: MCP Fully Rolled Out, FirstGen SaaS
2024: MCP Fully Rolled Out, FirstGen SaaS

raw_entities.name: Mobile & Web Development
raw_entities.description: Core engineering capability focused on building and maintaining web and mobile banking applications. This capability enabled the delivery of the New Mobile Bank, Next Generation Banking App, and integrated app store distribution channels.
context: focusing on web, mobile, middleware & testing

raw_entities.name: Data & AI Integration
raw_entities.description: Advanced data processing and artificial intelligence capabilities leveraged to drive banking innovations and modernize legacy systems. This capability supported strategic partnerships and enabled scalable digital service delivery across the client's ecosystem.
context: on the back of Data, AI & partnering in new areas
Data, AI & partnering in new areas

raw_entities.name: Replatforming & Modernization
raw_entities.description: Technical capability to migrate, replace, and modernize legacy banking infrastructure. This includes the ALAS replatforming, BI ACE migration, and login modernization initiatives designed to improve system performance and user experience.

raw_entities.name: Mortgage Origination & Advice
raw_entities.description: Digital transformation use case focused on streamlining mortgage processes and enabling remote advisory services. The initiative leveraged digital channels to improve customer access and operational efficiency in mortgage lending.
context: Initial team of 100 starts mortgage and integration projects

raw_entities.name: Open Banking & Regulatory Compliance
raw_entities.description: Application of API gateways and regulatory frameworks to meet open banking standards and ensure secure data sharing. This use case addresses increasing regulatory requirements while enabling third-party integrations and secure customer data access.
context: Open Banking Regulatory API Gateway Compliance
2019: Open Banking Regulatory API Gateway Compliance

raw_entities.name: Mobile Payments & App Store Integration
raw_entities.description: Deployment of mobile payment solutions and app store distribution channels to enhance customer engagement and transaction capabilities. This use case enabled seamless digital payments and expanded the client's mobile banking footprint.

raw_entities.name: Sustained Partnership Growth
raw_entities.description: Long-term strategic value demonstrated by a 17-year partnership with consistent team expansion and project delivery milestones. The sustained growth reflects high client satisfaction, successful delivery track records, and adaptive scaling across multiple technology generations.

raw_entities.name: Operational Efficiency via Offshoring
raw_entities.description: Significant cost and resource optimization achieved through a highly optimized 90% offshoring model. This delivery approach enabled rapid team scaling and accelerated digital transformation without compromising solution quality or compliance standards.
context: Team Doubles in size over 6 years

raw_entities.name: Regulatory Compliance Pressure
raw_entities.description: Increasing regulatory requirements around open banking and data security necessitating robust API gateway compliance and resiliency strategies. The client faced mounting pressure to meet strict financial data standards while maintaining seamless customer experiences.
context: Open Banking Regulatory API Gateway Compliance

raw_entities.name: Legacy System Modernization
raw_entities.description: Need to replace and modernize outdated banking infrastructure to support digital transformation and improve customer experience. Legacy constraints drove the replatforming of ALAS, BI ACE migration, and login modernization initiatives.

raw_entities.name: Microsoft Power Platform
raw_entities.description: Low-code development platform mobilized in 2021 to accelerate digital solution delivery and streamline development workflows. The platform enabled faster iteration and reduced dependency on traditional coding for internal banking applications.
context: 2021: SAMM Replaces, Microsoft Power Team Mobilized

raw_entities.name: PEGA BAW
raw_entities.description: Business Automation Workflow platform deployed in 2022 to streamline complex banking processes and improve operational efficiency. The tool enabled automated decisioning and standardized workflow execution across mortgage and core banking operations.

raw_entities.name: MyNationwide API Gateway
raw_entities.description: Secure API gateway launched in 2018 to enable seamless integration and data exchange for the MyNationwide digital banking ecosystem. The gateway facilitated third-party access, enhanced system interoperability, and supported open banking compliance.

raw_entities.name: SAMM Framework
raw_entities.description: Strategic application management and modernization framework used to replace legacy systems and standardize development practices. The framework provided a structured approach to digital transformation, replacing outdated processes with scalable governance models.
context: 2021: SAMM Replaces, Microsoft Power Team Mobilized

raw_entities.name: 17-Year Strategic Partnership Track Record
raw_entities.description: Proven long-term collaboration model demonstrating deep domain expertise, consistent delivery, and adaptive scaling across multiple technology generations. The extended partnership highlights IBM's ability to navigate leadership changes, regulatory shifts, and evolving client needs while maintaining high delivery standards.

raw_entities.name: Scalable Offshore Delivery Model
raw_entities.description: Highly optimized offshoring capability that scaled the delivery team to over 1,200 members, enabling rapid solution deployment and cost-efficient digital transformation. This model differentiates the offering by combining scale, speed, and domain-specific banking expertise.

raw_entities.name: IBM Consulting
raw_entities.description: The primary consulting and technology services division delivering digital transformation, AI, and modernization solutions to the client. IBM Consulting drives the strategic partnership, manages delivery teams, and implements banking-specific technology frameworks.

raw_entities.name: IBM Corporation
raw_entities.description: The parent technology and consulting organization providing the underlying platform, AI capabilities, and strategic partnership framework. IBM Corporation oversees the long-term client relationship and ensures alignment with global technology standards.

raw_entities.name: MyNationwide Go Live
raw_entities.description: Major digital milestone marking the successful launch and deployment of the MyNationwide API and associated banking services. The event represented a critical step in enabling open banking integrations and enhancing the client's digital ecosystem.

raw_entities.name: FirstGen SaaS Rollout
raw_entities.description: Full deployment of the next-generation SaaS platform in 2024, representing a major modernization milestone for the client's technology stack. The rollout signified the completion of long-term replatforming efforts and the transition to cloud-native architecture.
context: MCP Fully Rolled Out, FirstGen SaaS
2024: MCP Fully Rolled Out, FirstGen SaaS
